title: Additional Recovery Services | StretchLab
meta_description: StretchLab offers Normatec™ compression therapy services to help improve flexibility and improve muscle recovery.
body_markdown:
![aerial of 50 year old female smiling with comfort & relief, receiving hamstring stretches from expert flexologist on padded bench at stretchlab studio](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretches-header-480x360.png)
##    

# NORMATEC™ COMPRESSION THERAPY
![StretchLab trained stretch practitioner using Normatec compression therapy leg attachment on StretchLab member's legs](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/FINAL_S8A6370.jpg?width=1600&height=1067&name=FINAL_S8A6370.jpg)
Normatec™ is a pneumatic compression therapy designed to help improve circulation, improve flexibility and improve muscle recovery. The Normatec™ leg attachments utilize compressed air to massage the leg muscles and mobilize fluid.
**Benefits:**
  * Increased blood flow
  * Better range of motion
  * Recovery post-workout or long days


Members get one complimentary session, plus the option to add-on more Normatec™ sessions to your existing membership. Inquire with your studio to learn more!
## Improve your Flexibility with
## Normatec Sessions
